docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $338.82 FILED BY DEBOER ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT BURKS KEITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEBOER ELLEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURKS KEITH $346.00 PRINCIPAL, $28.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $374.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BURKS KEITH
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $398.31 AS TO DEFENDANT BURKS KEITH
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BURKS KEITH
